topic: Why ketones make your brain sharper than glucose
caption:
Ever wonder if there's a better fuel for your brain than the constant sugar rush? 🧠 Scientists are increasingly finding that ketones, derived from fat, offer a superior cognitive edge compared to glucose. While glucose provides quick energy, it often leads to energy crashes and mental fog. Ketones, however, offer a steady, clean burn, enhancing mitochondrial function and even boosting neuroprotective compounds like BDNF. This means sharper focus, better memory, and improved overall brain health without the rollercoaster. Dive into the science and discover how to fuel your brain for peak performance. ✨💡

💾 Save this so you don't lose it. Tag a friend who needs to sharpen their mental game. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health insights. Don't forget — your brain will thank you for this upgrade! 🚀
